race.comment: All of the raced division drop back to a short sprint. WON FOR VICKI (10) debuts a long way from home. She was close up in a recent 780m trial at Kembla Grange and, notably, JVO sticks from that. Has a low gate and finds a winnable assignment. SWEET MARLENE (8) has placed over 1000m in both starts this preparation and has more to offer. Will likely push forward and has winning claims. SUNVOLT (6) found a place here and then spiked his numbers beaten a head over 1400m at Grafton. Has the outside gate back pley in distance, but has been freshened up and is sure to finish hard. COMME CI COMME CA (1) is fast and was good at Port Macquarie first-up before folding up at Grafton over 1000m. Presents fitter and can give a better sight.
